title: Include mirrored columns in Item Card
excerpt: I just discovered Item Cards, and they’re fantastic - they could solve a major problem I’ve had with having to scroll back and forth across a large board when trying to look at one item at a time. The only problem is, th…

posts.author: ajwhitman (AJ W)
posts.cookedHtml: I just discovered Item Cards, and they’re fantastic - they could solve a major problem I’ve had with having to scroll back and forth across a large board when trying to look at one item at a time. The only problem is, this board has a LOT of mirrored content - almost all of the most-frequently referred to information is mirrored from somewhere else (from multiple boards). I would love if I could treat the information from mirrored columns the same way as “native” columns in an item card, and have all the info I want to see right up top together, and not buried throughout the (many) Connected Columns areas.
